name: valesco
description: Valesco-authored Claude Code skills for harness engineering and agent orchestration around the AFK autonomous-coding governance pipeline.

plugins.name: valesco
plugins.description: Skills bundle: /triage, /diagnose, /feedback-loop, /draft-contract, /attest, /brief-to-contract, /run-attested, plus tracker adapters (Linear, GitHub). Drives an issue from triage through goal-contract attestation, vendor-agnostic via the tracker adapter contract.
